item.title: I decided to do the bed bug prank on my mom🤣🤣🤣🤣Yalll my Mother is the realist person I know, she is hilarious!!! I could barely hold it together!!! She is so funny! She is something else 😆😆😆😆 #mother #fyp #bedbugprank #pranking #momsoftiktok
